title: ranunculus brutius subsp. crimaeus
intro: Ranunculus brutius subsp. crimaeus is a subspecies of the Ranunculus brutius plant, commonly known as the crinum buttercup, which is a type of flowering plant in the buttercup family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Ranunculus brutius subsp. crimaeus include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, making it a valuable herb for treating skin conditions and injuries. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing its flowers and leaves in water or oil, and it can be used as a topical ointment or tincture to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
